title: Earnings Call Summary: XPeng Q1 2024 Earnings Conference
text: XPeng held its Q1 2024 earnings conference call on May 21, 2024. The company reported 20% year-over-year increase in Smart EV deliveries with 21,821 units delivered in Q1. Gross margin expanded significantly to 12.9%, doubling from the previous quarter. Management provided forward guidance targeting mid to low-teen gross profit margins by the end of 2024. The company planned to launch different car models quarterly from Q3 onwards and aimed to open about 600 stores by Q3. The MONA product launch in the A-class sedan segment was positioned as a powerful and price-appropriate offering. The earnings call commentary highlighted XPeng's shift toward profitability while maintaining growth and expansion initiatives.
